update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Framework collection interval for self-metrics. Trap packet reception is event-driven and does not depend on this interval.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this trap listener job with a Virtual Node.

listen.title: Listen
listen.description: Network endpoints this listener binds during job creation.

receive_buffer.title: Receive buffer
receive_buffer.description: UDP socket receive buffer requested during job creation, in bytes. Set 0 to keep the operating system default. The default is 4 MiB per bound endpoint.

port.title: Port
port.description: UDP port number. Port 162 requires CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE or root. Netdata packages grant this capability to go.d.plugin and allow it in netdata.service.

communities.title: Communities
communities.description: SNMPv1/v2c community allowlist. Empty accepts all communities.

usm_users.title: USM Users
usm_users.description: SNMPv3 USM users with auth and privacy protocols. Auth and privacy keys use Netdata secret references.

engine_id.title: Engine ID
engine_id.description: SNMPv3 authoritative engine ID in hex (e.g. 80001f8880e5a5c0d6c7b8a9). Required for static v3 jobs. May be omitted when dynamic_engine_id_discovery is enabled; if supplied under dynamic discovery, it is validated and used as a preconfigured known pair for that user.

auth_key.title: Authentication key
auth_key.description: SNMPv3 authentication passphrase (use a Netdata secret reference). Required when auth_proto is not none; minimum 8 characters.

priv_key.title: Privacy key
priv_key.description: SNMPv3 privacy passphrase (use a Netdata secret reference). Required when priv_proto is not none; minimum 8 characters.

engine_id_whitelist.title: Engine ID Whitelist
engine_id_whitelist.description: Static SNMPv3 engine IDs accepted by this listener for v3 Trap PDUs (hex strings). Required when v3 is enabled and dynamic_engine_id_discovery is disabled. Must be empty when dynamic_engine_id_discovery is enabled.

local_engine_id.title: Local engine ID
local_engine_id.description: Receiver-local SNMPv3 engine ID for v3 INFORM authentication (hex string, 5-32 bytes). When omitted or empty, Netdata generates and persists a stable per-job engine ID under the Netdata lib directory at snmp-trap/{job_name}/local-engine-id (default /var/lib/netdata/snmp-trap/{job_name}/local-engine-id).

dynamic_engine_id_discovery.title: Dynamic engine ID discovery
dynamic_engine_id_discovery.description: When enabled, the listener discovers v3 Trap sender engine IDs at runtime from raw SNMPv3 context, and hot-registers new (engineID, username) pairs after the retry authenticates and decodes a v3 Trap. Static engine_id_whitelist must be empty. Dynamic registrations are in-memory, capped by dynamic_engine_id_max_pairs, and not persisted across restarts. Discovery is skipped for reportable SNMPv3 messages so confirmed-class traffic cannot enter the sender-registration path.

dynamic_engine_id_max_pairs.title: Dynamic engine ID maximum pairs
dynamic_engine_id_max_pairs.description: Maximum in-memory dynamic (engineID, username) pairs per job. When 0 or unset, uses the default of 4096. Once the cap is full, new dynamic pairs are rejected with an unknown_engine_id counter increment while existing pairs continue to work.

reverse_dns.title: Reverse DNS
reverse_dns.description: Optional source-IP PTR enrichment for _HOSTNAME. Disabled by default; when enabled, trap packet handling uses cached non-blocking lookups and falls back to source IP until a name is available.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable best-effort reverse DNS enrichment for trap source IPs.

source_cidrs.title: Source CIDRs
source_cidrs.description: Source IP CIDR allowlist matched before BER decode. Empty accepts IPv4 and IPv6 from all sources.

rate_limit.title: Rate Limit
rate_limit.description: Per-source token-bucket rate limiting. Default off.

per_source_pps.title: Per-source PPS
per_source_pps.description: Maximum traps per second from a single source IP. Set 0 to use the default.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Action when rate limit is exceeded: drop (discard trap) or sample (allow but count).

dedup.title: Deduplication
dedup.description: Optional per-job trap deduplication. Disabled by default; when enabled, repeated matching traps inside the window are summarized instead of journaled individually.

window_sec.title: Window seconds
window_sec.description: Deduplication window in seconds. Set to 0 or omit to use the default.

cache_max_entries.title: Cache maximum entries
cache_max_entries.description: Maximum fingerprints kept in memory. Set to 0 or omit to use the default.

journal.title: Direct journal output
journal.description: Direct Netdata journal storage for received traps. Enabled by default for explicit jobs and preflighted during job creation.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Write traps to local direct journal files under the configured Netdata log directory (/var/log/netdata/traps/{job_name}/ by default, or ${NETDATA_LOG_DIR}/traps/{job_name}/ at runtime) and expose the SNMP traps logs Function. Disable only when another backend, such as OTLP, is enabled.

otlp.title: OTLP exporter
otlp.description: Optional backend that exports traps as OTLP/gRPC LogRecords. Disabled by default. When enabled, the collector preflights the receiver at job creation time.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable OTLP/gRPC Logs export. When enabled, traps are exported through OTLP regardless of journal.enabled; if journal.enabled is true, traps are also written to local direct journals.

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: OTLP/gRPC endpoint. http://host:port and bare host:port use plaintext gRPC; https://host:port uses TLS with system trust roots. Use https:// for remote collectors when trap contents should be protected in transit.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Optional OTLP metadata headers. Values may use Netdata secret references. Header values are not emitted as trap attributes.

request_timeout.title: Request timeout
request_timeout.description: Timeout for OTLP connection preflight and export calls.

flush_interval.title: Flush interval
flush_interval.description: Maximum time to buffer OTLP records before an export attempt.

batch_size.title: Batch size
batch_size.description: Maximum OTLP LogRecords per export request. Set 0 or omit to use the default.

queue_capacity.title: Queue capacity
queue_capacity.description: Maximum OTLP records buffered per job. Set 0 or omit to use the default.

retention.title: Retention
retention.description: Per-job direct journal retention and rotation policy. Ignored when journal.enabled is false.

max_size.title: Maximum total size
max_size.description: Maximum total bytes across all journal files for this job. Set to null to disable size-based eviction.

max_duration.title: Maximum age
max_duration.description: Maximum age of the oldest journal file before deletion. Set to null to disable age-based eviction.

rotation_size.title: Per-file rotation size
rotation_size.description: Maximum size of a single journal file before rotation. Set to null for automatic calculation (max_size / 20, clamped 5MB-200MB).

rotation_duration.title: Per-file rotation duration
rotation_duration.description: Maximum age of a single journal file before rotation. Null or 0 disables time-based rotation.

overrides.title: Per-OID overrides
overrides.description: Per-OID category, severity, and label overrides on top of profile defaults.

metrics.title: Per-OID metric opt-in
metrics.description: Promote selected trap OIDs to dedicated metric charts for finer-grained alerting. Each entry defines an OID, a context name (must start with "snmp.trap."), and an optional bounded-cardinality varbind for multi-dimensional counting.

oid.title: OID
oid.description: Numeric trap OID to emit as a metric.

dimension_from_varbind.title: Dimension from varbind
dimension_from_varbind.description: Symbolic varbind name used as dimension value. Must reference an enum-backed varbind with <= 64 values, a boolean/truthvalue, or a numeric range with <= 64 values.

headers.ui:help: Use secret references for bearer tokens or API keys where possible.
